+-----------+    +-----------+    +-----------+
|  Node C1  |    |  Node C2  |    |  Node C3  |
+-----------+    +-----------+    +-----------+
      ^                ^                ^
      |                |                |
      +-------+--------+-------+--------+-------+
              |                |                |
        +-----+-----+    +-----+-----+    +-----+-----+
        |  Node B3  |    |  Node B2  |    |  Node B1  |
        +-----------+    +-----------+    +-----------+
              ^                ^                ^
              |                |                |
              +-------+--------+-------+--------+-------+
                      |                |                |
                +-----+-----+    +-----+-----+    +-----+-----+
                |  Node A1  |    |  Node A2  |    |  Node A3  |
                +-----------+    +-----------+    +-----------+
